channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Harden scores 50 points for 1st time with Clippers as Los Angeles beats Pistons 123-115
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden scored 50 points, his 24th career 50-point game and first with the Clippers, and Los Angeles beat the Detroit Pistons 123-115 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucks' Giannis Antetokounmpo says consistency of his work ethic helped him join 20,000-point club
item.description: Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo believes his latest milestone should serve as a testament to his consistent work ethic.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lightning acquire Gourde and Bjorkstrand and Panthers get Vanecek as NHL trade action heats up
item.description: While the Tampa Bay Lightning answered the cross-state-rival and defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers' activity ahead of the NHL trade deadline with a big move of their own Wednesday to bolster their playoff chances, an Eastern Conference bottom-feeder well out of contention was a buyer o
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alex Ovechkin gets 885th career goal to move nine away from tying Wayne Gretzky's NHL record
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin scored his 885th career goal midway through the third period of the Washington Capitals' game against New York Rangers on Wednesday night, moving nine away from tying Wayne Gretzky's NHL record.
item.dc:creator: VIN A. CHERWOO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mavericks' Kidd blasts speculation that a heavy workload contributed to Irving's knee injury
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Dallas Mavericks coach Jason Kidd took issue Wednesday with media speculation that Kyrie Irving’s heavy workload over the last month led to the nine-time All-Star’s season-ending knee injury.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pritchard, White become 1st Boston duo to score 40+ in same game, 1st duo in NBA history with 9+ 3s
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Payton Pritchard and Derrick White have been mostly glue guys during their time with the Boston Celtics, filling in gaps and providing sparks when necessary.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Chargers release linebacker Joey Bosa after 9 seasons with the franchise
item.description: The Los Angeles Chargers released Joey Bosa on Wednesday night, ending the linebacker's nine-season tenure with the franchise. The move, which came less than a week before the start of the new league year, was expected due to Bosa's large salary cap number and injury history.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Antetokounmpo joins 20,000-point club as Bucks roll past short-handed Mavericks 137-107
item.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo scored 32 points to bring his career total over 20,000, Damian Lillard added 34 points and Kevin Porter Jr. had a triple-double as the surging Milwaukee Bucks trounced the short-handed Dallas Mavericks 137-107 The 30-year-old Antetokounmpo has scored 20,010 career points.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cavaliers hold off Heat 112-107 to extend winning streak to 12 and clinch playoff spot
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 26 points, Darius Garland had 10 assists and the Cleveland Cavaliers survived some sloppiness in the final two minutes to win their 12th straight game, 112-107 over the banged-up Miami Heat on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Condon helps No. 5 Florida top No. 7 Alabama 99-94 in key SEC matchup
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Alex Condon had 27 points and10 rebounds to lead No. 5 Florida to a 99-94 win over No. 7 Alabama on Wednesday night. The Gators (26-4, 13-4 Southeastern Conference) also got 22 points and eight assists from Walter Clayton Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sharks trade 2028 draft pick to Penguins for veteran defenseman
item.description: San Jose Sharks acquire Vincent Desharnais from Pittsburgh Penguins for a 2028 fifth-round draft pick
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Cowboys restructure Prescott and Lamb deals, but any impact on free agency is murky
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Dallas Cowboys created nearly $57 million in salary cap space by restructuring the contracts of star quarterback Dak Prescott and his top receiver, CeeDee Lamb.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jai Lucas, Miami finalize agreement to make him Hurricanes' coach, AP source says
item.description: Jai Lucas and Miami have finalized the contract that makes him the school's new men's basketball coach, nearly two weeks after they struck preliminary agreement on a deal, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio state senator introduces bill to stop Ohio State games from being broadcast on streaming services
item.description: Ohio state Sen. Bill DeMora has introduced a bill that would prohibit state universities, notably Ohio State, from broadcasting games exclusively on streaming platforms.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lightning acquire Gourde,Bjorkstrand as NHL trade action heats up
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning have answered the cross-state-rival and defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers' first couple of additions ahead of the NHL trade deadline with a big move of their own.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Phil Mickelson rips Fred Couples as 'low class' over claims Brooks Koepka wants back in PGA Tour
item.description: Phil Mickelson called out Fred Couples in a fiery post on social media on Tuesday after the PGA Tour veteran claimed Brooks Koepka wants to get back on the Tour.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR countersues 23XI and Front Row, as well as Michael Jordan's manager, in dispute over charters
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — NASCAR's revenue-sharing charter system is under threat of being disbanded, according to a Wednesday counterclaim filed by the stock car series against Michael Jordan-owned 23XI Racing and Front Row Motorsports that singles out Jordan's longtime business manager.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rookie No. 1 pick Macklin Celebrini stays upbeat in finding positives amidst Sharks' losing season
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — Rookie center Macklin Celebrini has been steadfast in staying upbeat amidst a losing season in which the young, rebuilding San Jose Sharks are in jeopardy of finishing last in the NHL standings for a second consecutive year.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Knight, Coyne Schofield lead mix of experience, youth on US women world hockey championship roster
item.description: The United States is bringing a mix of familiar faces — starting with Hilary Knight and Kendall Coyne Schofield — and youth to the women’s world hockey championship tournament in the Czech Republic next month.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 7 stand trial over cyber death threats against Paris Olympics artistic director
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The trial of seven people charged in connection with alleged cyberbullying targeting the artistic director of last summer’s Paris Olympics’ opening and closing ceremonies has started in a Paris court.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls Fest 2025: Team announces dates, registration open for 3v3 tournament
item.description: CHICAGO — Registration is now open for Bulls Fest 2025, which will be held outdoors on the United Center campus from Aug. 23-24, the team announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Travis Kelce dishes on reasons for Chiefs return after retirement rumors
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs star tight end Travis Kelce talked about his reasoning for returning for his 13th NFL season amid retirement rumors on his podcast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz lose to Pelicans in battle for last place, 128-121
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The victories just aren't that important right now for the Utah Jazz. Getting their younger players game experience in the priority, and plenty of young guys saw the floor Sunday in a 128-121 loss to New Orleans Sunday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Soccer: Bonita Vista 2, Torrey Pines 1
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- CIF Girls Open Division semifinals Bonita Vista Barons on track to repeat if with a win playing at Torrey Pines on Wednesday night. Falcons lead 1-0, but then Bonita Vista scored on a penalty kick that Ava Gavlan ripped to the net to tie the match at 1.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 73, Cathedral 61
item.description:
Carlsbad basketball had a repeat on its mind: a goal to get back to the Open Division title game.
Consider it mission accomplished after a 73 to 61 win over a hard charging Cathedral team.
Jett Kenady was the difference for the Lancers on Tuesday night, scoring 24 points. Jake Hall added 22.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5
